verdict.summary: Nav2 behavior tree action fails. Root cause varies: costmap not ready, planner timeout, controller stuck.

dead_ends.action: Restart Nav2 stack on every failure
dead_ends.why_fails: Restarts are expensive and lose all accumulated costmap data; hides the actual navigation issue

dead_ends.action: Increase all timeouts to very large values
dead_ends.why_fails: Masks configuration errors; robot sits idle for minutes before finally reporting failure

dead_ends.action: Replace the entire BT XML with a simple sequence
dead_ends.why_fails: Loses recovery behaviors, replanning, and fallback strategies

workarounds.action: Check Nav2 logs for the specific BT node that failed
Verify costmap is populated (not empty) before navigation
Test individual Nav2 components (planner, controller) separately

preceded_by.condition: Nav2 requires complete TF tree; missing frames cause planner failures
